summary: GİB Bağlantı page testing completed successfully. All core features working: direct route navigation, sidebar item, status badge, connect form, date range presets, custom date inputs, action buttons, error mapping, and mobile responsiveness. Backend GIB endpoints all pass (12/12 tests). Existing plasiyer navigation unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: GibConnectionPage.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Error mapping function mapErrorMessage() correctly handles backend error codes and provides Turkish user-friendly messages
Credentials are kept in local state only as required - not persisted
Import button correctly disabled when not connected
Custom date range inputs only appear when 'Özel aralık' is selected
seed_data_creation: None - used existing plasiyer user sf_plasiyer/plasiyer123
context_for_next_testing_agent: GİB Bağlantı page fully tested. Key findings: 1) Direct route /plasiyer/gib-connection works after login. 2) Sidebar item 'GİB Bağlantı' navigates correctly and shows active state. 3) Initial page load calls GET /api/gib/live/status automatically. 4) Status badge shows 'Bağlı değil' when not connected. 5) Connect form has username/password inputs with masked password. 6) Date range presets (7/30/90/custom) work correctly. 7) Custom date inputs appear only when 'Özel aralık' selected. 8) Import button disabled when not connected. 9) Error messages mapped to Turkish user-friendly text. 10) Mobile viewport renders correctly. 11) All existing plasiyer tabs still work (regression verified).

backend_tests.POST /api/gib/live/import/start: PASS - Returns 409 when not connected (expected behavior)
backend_tests.role_authorization: PASS - Customer role cannot access GIB endpoints

frontend_tests.direct_route_navigation: PASS - /plasiyer/gib-connection loads GIB page after login
frontend_tests.sidebar_item: PASS - 'GİB Bağlantı' item present and navigates correctly
frontend_tests.sidebar_active_state: PASS - Item highlighted when on GIB page
frontend_tests.status_badge: PASS - Shows 'Bağlı değil' when not connected
frontend_tests.connect_button_disabled: PASS - Disabled without credentials, enabled with credentials
frontend_tests.date_range_presets: PASS - 7/30/90/custom buttons render and toggle correctly
frontend_tests.custom_date_inputs: PASS - Appear only when 'Özel aralık' selected
frontend_tests.status_refresh_button: PASS - Calls status endpoint and updates badge
frontend_tests.disconnect_button: PASS - Calls disconnect endpoint and shows toast
frontend_tests.error_mapping: PASS - Backend errors mapped to Turkish messages
